siteOptions.blogdescription: A disposable store for support and troubleshooting exercises

update_option('woocommerce_task_list_hidden', 'yes'); update_option('woocommerce_task_list_complete', 'yes'); update_option('woocommerce_extended_task_list_hidden', 'yes'); update_option('woocommerce_task_list_welcome_modal_dismissed', 'yes'); update_option('woocommerce_allow_tracking', 'no'); /* Keep the disposable demo publicly viewable inside Playground. */ update_option('woocommerce_coming_soon', 'no'); update_option('woocommerce_store_pages_only', 'no'); $category_ids = array(); foreach (array('Desk Tools', 'Paper Goods', 'Travel') as $category_name) { $term = term_exists($category_name, 'product_cat'); if (!$term) { $term = wp_insert_term($category_name, 'product_cat'); } if (!is_wp_error($term)) { $category_ids[$category_name] = intval(is_array($term) ? $term['term_id'] : $term); } } $products = array( array('name' => 'Field Notes Set', 'sku' => 'NW-FIELD-001', 'price' => '14.00', 'stock' => 25, 'category' => 'Paper Goods', 'description' => 'A set of three compact notebooks for structured daily notes.'), array('name' => 'Cable Organizer', 'sku' => 'NW-CABLE-002', 'price' => '9.50', 'stock' => 40, 'category' => 'Desk Tools', 'description' => 'A simple organizer for charging and desk cables.'), array('name' => 'Travel Document Wallet', 'sku' => 'NW-TRAVEL-003', 'price' => '24.00', 'stock' => 12, 'category' => 'Travel', 'description' => 'A compact document wallet with labelled sections.'), array('name' => 'Desk Planning Pad', 'sku' => 'NW-PLAN-004', 'price' => '18.00', 'stock' => 18, 'category' => 'Paper Goods', 'description' => 'An undated weekly planning pad for priorities and follow-ups.') ); $created_ids = array(); foreach ($products as $item) { $existing_id = wc_get_product_id_by_sku($item['sku']); if ($existing_id) { $created_ids[] = $existing_id; continue; } $product = new WC_Product_Simple(); $product->set_name($item['name']); $product->set_sku($item['sku']); $product->set_regular_price($item['price']); $product->set_manage_stock(true); $product->set_stock_quantity($item['stock']); $product->set_stock_status('instock'); $product->set_description($item['description']); if (isset($category_ids[$item['category']])) { $product->set_category_ids(array($category_ids[$item['category']])); } $created_ids[] = $product->save(); } if (!wc_get_product_id_by_sku('NW-NOTE-005')) { $variable = new WC_Product_Variable(); $variable->set_name('Structured Notes Workbook'); $variable->set_sku('NW-NOTE-005'); $variable->set_description('A workbook available in two formats for testing variation behaviour.'); $attribute = new WC_Product_Attribute(); $attribute->set_name('Format'); $attribute->set_options(array('A5', 'A4')); $attribute->set_visible(true); $attribute->set_variation(true); $variable->set_attributes(array($attribute)); if (isset($category_ids['Paper Goods'])) { $variable->set_category_ids(array($category_ids['Paper Goods'])); } $variable_id = $variable->save(); foreach (array( array('format' => 'A5', 'price' => '16.00', 'stock' => 15), array('format' => 'A4', 'price' => '22.00', 'stock' => 8) ) as $data) { $variation = new WC_Product_Variation(); $variation->set_parent_id($variable_id); $variation->set_attributes(array('format' => $data['format'])); $variation->set_regular_price($data['price']); $variation->set_manage_stock(true); $variation->set_stock_quantity($data['stock']); $variation->set_stock_status('instock'); $variation->save(); } $created_ids[] = $variable_id; } $coupon = new WC_Coupon('WELCOME10'); if (!$coupon->get_id()) { $coupon = new WC_Coupon(); $coupon->set_code('WELCOME10'); $coupon->set_discount_type('percent'); $coupon->set_amount(10); $coupon->set_usage_limit(100); $coupon->set_description('Portfolio lab coupon for checkout testing.'); $coupon->save(); } $zones = WC_Shipping_Zones::get_zones(); $germany_exists = false; foreach ($zones as $zone_data) { if ($zone_data['zone_name'] === 'Germany') { $germany_exists = true; break; } } if (!$germany_exists) { $zone = new WC_Shipping_Zone(); $zone->set_zone_name('Germany'); $zone->add_location('DE', 'country'); $instance_id = $zone->add_shipping_method('flat_rate'); $zone->save(); update_option( 'woocommerce_flat_rate_' . $instance_id . '_settings', array('title' => 'Flat rate', 'tax_status' => 'taxable', 'cost' => '5.00') ); } if (!get_page_by_path('support-lab-brief')) { wp_insert_post(array( 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_name' => 'support-lab-brief', 'post_title' => 'Support Lab Brief', 'post_content' => '

Northwind Studio Support Lab

This disposable store was generated from a WordPress Playground Blueprint. It contains products, variations, a coupon, a Germany shipping zone, and test content for support exercises.

  • Coupon: WELCOME10
  • Germany flat rate: €5
  • Variable product: Structured Notes Workbook
  • Use staging-style troubleshooting: document each change and restore the baseline when finished.
' )); } if (empty(wc_get_orders(array('limit' => 1)))) { $order = wc_create_order(); if (!empty($created_ids)) { $sample_product = wc_get_product($created_ids[0]); if ($sample_product) { $order->add_product($sample_product, 2); } } $order->set_address(array( 'first_name' => 'Sample', 'last_name' => 'Customer', 'email' => 'sample@example.test', 'address_1' => 'Teststrasse 10', 'city' => 'Berlin', 'postcode' => '10115', 'country' => 'DE' ), 'billing'); $order->set_address(array( 'first_name' => 'Sample', 'last_name' => 'Customer', 'address_1' => 'Teststrasse 10', 'city' => 'Berlin', 'postcode' => '10115', 'country' => 'DE' ), 'shipping'); $order->calculate_totals(); $order->update_status('pending', 'Portfolio lab test order.'); } echo 'Northwind Studio WooCommerce lab created successfully.';
